list.expr:
count by (job,instance,alertname) (max_over_time(ALERTS{alertstate="firing", severity="critical", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval]))
  * on(job,instance) group_left group by (job,instance) (sysUpTime{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"})
list.name: Critical alert

list.expr:
count by (job,instance,alertname) (max_over_time(ALERTS{alertstate="firing", severity="warning", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}[$__rate_interval]))
  * on(job,instance) group_left group by (job,instance) (sysUpTime{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"})
list.name: Warning alert

panels.description: Memory utilization.

targets.expr:
avg by (job,instance) (
  # NX-OS:
(
  cpmCPUMemoryUsed{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  /
  (cpmCPUMemoryUsed{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"} + cpmCPUMemoryFree{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}) * 100
)
or
# cisco CISCO-ENHANCED-MEMPOOL-MIB
# cempMemPoolType="10" - virtual memory, i.e in ASA(v).
(
  (
    cempMemPoolUsed{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
    /
    (cempMemPoolUsed{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"} + cempMemPoolFree{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}) * 100
  ) * on (instance, cempMemPoolIndex, entPhysicalIndex) group_left () 
        (cempMemPoolType{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"} == 10)/10
)
or
# cisco firmwares that supports only CISCO-MEMORY-POOL-MIB
# ciscoMemoryPoolType="1" - Processor
(ciscoMemoryPoolUsed{ciscoMemoryPoolType="1", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
/
(ciscoMemoryPoolUsed{ciscoMemoryPoolType="1", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"} + ciscoMemoryPoolFree{ciscoMemoryPoolType="1", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}) * 100)

)
or
avg by (job,instance) (
  hrStorageUsed{hrStorageDescr!~".*(?i:(cache|buffer)).*", hrStorageType="1.3.6.1.2.1.25.2.1.2", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}/hrStorageSize{hrStorageDescr!~".*(?i:(cache|buffer)).*", hrStorageType="1.3.6.1.2.1.25.2.1.2", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}*100

)
or
avg by (job,instance) (
  hrStorageUsed{hrStorageDescr="main memory",hrStorageIndex="65536", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}/hrStorageSize{hrStorageDescr="main memory",hrStorageIndex="65536", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}*100

)
or
avg by (job,instance) (
  jnxOperatingBuffer{jnxOperatingContentsIndex="9", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
)

panels.title: Memory utilization

panels.description:
status (sum): Interface operational status(ifOperStatus).
  

admin status (sum): The desired state of the interface. 
The testing(3) state indicates that no operational
packets can be passed.
  

Speed (sum): An estimate of the interface's current bandwidth in units of 1,000,000 bits per second.
If this object reports a value of `n' then the speed of the interface is somewhere in the range of `n-500,000' to `n+499,999'.
For interfaces which do not vary in bandwidth or for those where no accurate estimation can be made, this object should contain the nominal bandwidth.
For a sub-layer which has no concept of bandwidth, this object should be zero.
  

Type (sum): The type of interface, distinguished according to the physical/link protocol(s) immediately `below' the network layer in the protocol stack.
  

promiscuous mode (sum): This object has a value of false(2) if this interface only accepts packets/frames that are addressed to this station. 
This object has a value of true(1) when the station accepts all packets/frames transmitted on the media.
The value true(1) is only legal on certain types of media. 
If legal, setting this object to a value of true(1) may require the interface to be reset before becoming effective. 
The value of ifPromiscuousMode does not affect the reception of broadcast and multicast packets/frames by the interface.
  

connector (sum): This object has the value 'true(1)' if the interface sublayer has a physical connector and the value 'false(2)' otherwise.
  

MTU (sum): Maximum transmission unit (MTU).
  

Last change (sum): Interface last change.
  

MAC (sum): MAC.

targets.expr:
# ignore when ifLastCHange == 0 as invalid
sum by (job,instance,ifName,ifAlias,ifDescr) (
  (sysUpTime{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"} - on(job,instance) group_right () (ifLastChange{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance",ifName=~"$ifName"})!=0)
)/100

panels.title: Interfaces

panels.description:
credit receive (sum): The current value of receive buffer-to-buffer credits for this port.
  

credit transmit (sum): The current value of transmit buffer-to-buffer credits for this port.
panels.title: FC buffer-to-buffer credit

panels.description:
fcIfTxWaitCount (sum): The number of times the FC-port waited due to lack of transmit credits.
  

fcIfFramesDiscard (sum): The number of frames discarded by the FC-port.
  

fcIfTxWtAvgBBCreditTransitionToZero (sum): fcIfTxWtAvgBBCreditTransitionToZero increments if the credit
available is zero for 100 ms.
  

fcHCIfBBCreditTransistionFromZero (sum): fcHCIfBBCreditTransistionFromZero increments if the transmit b2b
credit is zero.
  

fcHCIfBBCreditTransistionToZero (sum): fcHCIfBBCreditTransistionToZero increments if the receive b2b
credit is zero.
  

fcIfInvalidCrcs (sum): The number of invalid CRCs detected by the FC-Port.
  

fcIfInvalidTxWords (sum): The number of invalid transmission words detected by the FC-Port.

targets.refId: FC wait due to lack of transmit credits.

panels.title: FC errors

panels.description: Temperature sensor.

targets.expr:
(
  avg by (job,instance) (
  mtxrHlTemperature{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
)
)/10
or
(
  avg by (job,instance,jnxOperatingDescr) (
  jnxOperatingTemp{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
)
)!=0
or
avg by (job,instance,entPhysicalName) (
  # https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc3433.html
# entSensorPrecision:
# If an object of this type contains a value in the range 1 to
# 9, it represents the number of decimal places in the
# fractional part of an associated EntitySensorValue fixed-
# point number.
# If an object of this type contains a value in the range -8
# to -1, it represents the number of accurate digits in the
# associated EntitySensorValue fixed-point number.
# entSensorScale
#     SYNTAX INTEGER {
#         yocto(1),   -- 10^-24
#         zepto(2),   -- 10^-21
#         atto(3),    -- 10^-18
#         femto(4),   -- 10^-15
#         pico(5),    -- 10^-12
#         nano(6),    -- 10^-9
#         micro(7),   -- 10^-6
#         milli(8),   -- 10^-3
#         units(9),   -- 10^0
#         kilo(10),   -- 10^3
#         mega(11),   -- 10^6
#         giga(12),   -- 10^9
#         tera(13),   -- 10^12
#         exa(14),    -- 10^15
#         peta(15),   -- 10^18
#         zetta(16),  -- 10^21
#         yotta(17)   -- 10^24
#     }
(
  entSensorValue{entSensorScale="9", entSensorType="8", entPhysicalName!~".+(\\d+/\\d+(/\\d+)?).*", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  *10^-entSensorPrecision{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  or
  entSensorValue{entSensorScale="8", entSensorType="8", entPhysicalName!~".+(\\d+/\\d+(/\\d+)?).*", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  *10^-3
  *10^-entSensorPrecision{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  or 
  entSensorValue{entSensorScale="7", entSensorType="8", entPhysicalName!~".+(\\d+/\\d+(/\\d+)?).*", job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
  *10^-6
  *10^-entSensorPrecision{job=~"$job",instance=~"$instance"}
)

)
